title: 甘くて小さいヒーロー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Hishi Akebono mentions that Biko
Pegasus doesn't seem her usual self and that her
races might be causing her depression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To help pick up her mood, we invite her out to
pick oranges for a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even during a crisis, Biko Pegasus's courage and
infallible spirit shine through. Hishi Akebono
looks upon her with glowing admiration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, Hishi Akebono offers
encouragement to Biko Pegasus, who's been
feeling hindered in her races by her small stature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono tells her how inspired she is by
Biko Pegasus's optimism and says she's her hero.
Spurred by those words, Biko Pegasus is able to
stand tall once again.
